sample_titles: Principal/Sr Principal Control Account Project Specialist
Principal / Sr Principal AI Software Engineer
note: Host ngc.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com; corporate external careers site; company=ngc; US-inclusive.

GD has no single corporate ATS board (gd.com/careers is a JS aggregator). Captured largest supported-ATS unit GDIT (General Dynamics Information Technology) on Workday. Other GD units on iCIMS: careers-gdeb.icims.com (Electric Boat), careers-gd-ots.icims.com (OTS), careers-gdms.icims.com (Mission Systems).

Public portal digitalcareers.infosys.com is a SmartDreamers front-end over BrassRing (reqids carry BR suffix). Real BrassRing host sjobs.brassring.com partnerid=25633 siteid=5439; company=Infosys; US-inclusive.

careers.wipro.com is new-gen SAP SuccessFactors CSB that renders jobs via a no-auth POST JSON API /services/recruiting/v1/jobs (body {locale:en_US, limit, offset}; records jobSearchResult[].response, total totalJobs=7850). SDK successfactors provider only scrapes legacy HTML (returns 0), so captured via apicapture (tls_impersonate). US-inclusive (Tampa FL confirmed). Spec added to apicapture.json key 'wipro'.

iCIMS new/Jibe JSON API; careers host jobs.statefarm.com proxies /api/jobs (totalCount=140, hiring_organization 'State Farm'). Use stable careers host, not the date-stamped c-11308-...i.icims.com host. US locations.
